title: Monetary Policy Operations
summary: This page is a navigation/index entry point on the ECB website that describes where to access consolidated balance sheet data for the Eurosystem's monetary policy operations. The source contains no specific data, figures, or policy announcements. It merely indicates that monetary policy operations encompass open market operations, standing facilities, and minimum reserve requirements, and provides links to download CSV and XLS files for historical balance sheet data from 1999-2025.
key_points: Source is a navigation/index page, not a substantive research document
Monetary policy operations are described as including open market operations, standing facilities, and minimum reserve requirements
Annual consolidated balance sheet data available for download (CSV/XLS format) covering 1999-2025
Related content links to Annual Report and Weekly financial statements
No specific data points, figures, or policy details are provided in this source body
No publication date or specific URL provided in metadata
